title: Policy: Policy applied - Turn off WiFi
scenario: Policy-locked settings remain unmodifiable with pop-up notification when Wi-Fi is turned off on Poly device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
4. Confirm that Policies have been applied to the device (e.g., via MDM or Poly Lens).
5. Turn off Wi-Fi on the Android device.
6. Attempt to modify a setting that is locked by Policy (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, or Notifications).
7. Observe the behavior when trying to change the locked setting.
expected: The locked setting cannot be modified. A pop-up message appears indicating that the setting cannot be modified offline.
